purpose: Website route readiness registry for report-only assessment of public pages, legal pages, desktop beta pages, mobile/PWA pages, and protected/review-required website surfaces before runtime implementation.

readinessStatuses.empty: No meaningful route evidence or content/readiness baseline exists yet.
readinessStatuses.draft: Route exists or is planned but needs readiness evidence, content review, route/link checks, and visual/mobile checks.
readinessStatuses.usable: Route appears usable as a beta/public surface but still needs conversion, investor, or device evidence before higher status.
readinessStatuses.conversion_ready: Public conversion criteria, content clarity, route/link evidence, visual smoke, and protected-claim review are complete.
readinessStatuses.investor_ready: Investor-facing claims are substantiated, reviewed, and linked to approved sources; protected topics remain reviewed.
readinessStatuses.beta_ready: Beta route criteria, route/link evidence, visual/mobile evidence, and protected-topic reviews are complete.
readinessStatuses.blocked: Route cannot advance until a documented blocker is resolved.
readinessStatuses.review_required: Route or topic touches legal, privacy, health, child, token/economy, payment, reward, investor, public-claim, analytics, AI, camera/AR, or compliance-sensitive material.

routeGroups.public_pages: Public website and acquisition/help/waitlist surfaces. Conversion and SEO work is planning-only until approved.
routeGroups.legal_pages: Datenschutz, AGB, Impressum, and other legal/compliance pages. Always human-review-required for wording changes.
routeGroups.desktop_beta_pages: Authenticated or beta-preview desktop application routes. No client authority changes through this framework.
routeGroups.mobile_pwa_pages: Mobile/PWA routes requiring manual device, permission, viewport, PWA, and privacy evidence.
routeGroups.protected_or_review_required_pages: Routes involving competition, rewards, economy, marketplace, analytics, AR/camera, health, child, payment, token/NFT, investor, or public-claim topics.

websiteBacklogUsage: Detailed route findings, review_required website gaps, blocked items, and next safe tasks live in the report-only Website Agent Backlog; this readiness register remains the route/status summary.

readinessSummary.publicPages: Registered public pages are draft or usable; none are conversion_ready because conversion, SEO, visual smoke, and protected-claim review evidence is incomplete.
readinessSummary.legalPages: Legal pages remain review_required; no legal wording or runtime legal pages were changed.
readinessSummary.desktopBetaPages: Desktop beta pages are usable, draft, or review_required depending on protected topics; no beta_ready advancement is recorded.
readinessSummary.mobilePwaPages: Mobile/PWA pages remain draft or review_required because manual route-by-route phone evidence and browser visual smoke evidence are incomplete.
readinessSummary.protectedOrReviewRequiredPages: Reward, mission completion, PvP/betting, marketplace/token/NFT/payment, analytics/privacy, health, camera/AR, AI Buddy, legal/compliance, and /challenge alias risks remain review_required after the Route & Link Integrity Audit.

evidenceSummary.routeApiDriftDetector: PASS with 31 discovered app pages, 9 discovered API routes, 32 registered pages, and no missing route/API register entries.
evidenceSummary.visualRouteSmokeCheck: SKIPPED_BROWSER_UNAVAILABLE; no screenshots generated and no baseline/current comparison evidence exists in this environment.
evidenceSummary.productReadinessCheck: PASS; sensitive modules remain blocked or review_required where applicable and no critical module is production_ready.
evidenceSummary.websiteAgentFrameworkCheck: PASS; report-only framework remains active and forbids runtime changes, auto-merge, auto-repair, approval, and deployment.
evidenceSummary.websiteAgentBacklogCheck: PASS; backlog entries remain machine-readable and report-only.
evidenceSummary.qualityGate: Initial quality gate reported FAIL only because PR diff review report exits with code 1 before a PR exists; all website framework/backlog/readiness checks ran safely.
evidenceSummary.routeLinkIntegrityAudit: DONE; no supported route/register drift was found, /challenge remains a review_required alias to /missionen/challenge, and all clickability/redirect/mobile/PWA behavior still needs future browser/device validation.

blockedOrReviewRequired: Legal/privacy/compliance wording requires human review before status advancement.
Mobile/PWA readiness needs device model, OS, browser, viewport, PWA, permission, and route-specific manual evidence.

Protected economy, token/NFT, payment, PvP/betting, reward authority, mission completion, health, child, analytics, camera/AR, and AI Buddy routes require review and must not be marked conversion_ready, investor_ready, or beta_ready.
baselineAudit.runtimeChangeConfirmation: No runtime website, app, mobile, legal, package, Firebase, GitHub workflow, public asset, Functions, Firestore rules, or Unity files were changed.

routeGroupSummary.publicPages: Registered public routes /, /register, /faq, and /hilfe remain mapped in routes.json and website-readiness.json; conversion/content/SEO/link behavior still needs future browser validation before readiness advancement.
routeGroupSummary.legalPages: Registered legal routes /datenschutz, /agb, and /impressum remain review_required; this audit only confirms route presence and does not review or edit legal wording.
routeGroupSummary.desktopBetaPages: Registered desktop beta routes remain mapped; /missionen is an active-redirect route and mission navigation evidence points to registered mission subroutes, including canonical /missionen/challenge.
routeGroupSummary.mobilePwaPages: Registered mobile/PWA routes remain mapped; route-specific device, PWA, permission, and browser evidence is still required before readiness advancement.
routeGroupSummary.protectedOrReviewRequiredPages: Challenge/PvP, rewards, marketplace/economy, analytics/privacy, AI Buddy, camera/AR, health, mission completion, and legal/compliance routes remain review_required.

aliasesAndCanonicalRoutes.evidence: website-readiness.json maps /challenge as not_registered_review_required_alias to registered /missionen/challenge; routes.json registers /missionen/challenge and does not register /challenge.
aliasesAndCanonicalRoutes.decision: Keep /missionen/challenge canonical unless human review requests a runtime alias/redirect in a separate task.

aliasesAndCanonicalRoutes.evidence: routes.json marks /missionen active-redirect; existing mission route readiness keeps it registered.
aliasesAndCanonicalRoutes.decision: Treat /missionen as an existing redirect surface and validate redirect/link behavior in future runtime/browser evidence, not in this documentation-only audit.

staleRouteReferences.evidence: Preserved as a readiness alias only; not registered in routes.json and not to be created as a duplicate route from this audit.

missingOrUnclearRouteMappings.evidence: Static inspection can confirm literal registered route references, but clickability, auth/preview behavior, redirects, external links, and mobile/PWA install/permission behavior require future browser/device validation.

routeLinkIntegrityAudit.runtimeChangeConfirmation: No runtime route files, navigation components, legal pages, mobile/PWA code, protected product logic, package/config, public assets, Functions, Firestore rules, GitHub workflow files, Unity files, auto-merge, auto-repair, approval, or deployment behavior was changed.

sourceFiles: todolist/G - REWARD SYSTEM - SYSTEM HEALTH - NEXT-GEN MECHANICS

routeGroupSummary.publicPages: /, /register, /faq, and /hilfe remain draft or usable only; public beta, support, CTA, SEO, analytics, and sponsor/partner claims need review before conversion_ready advancement when protected claims are involved.
routeGroupSummary.legalPages: /datenschutz, /agb, and /impressum remain review_required. This audit did not make legal conclusions or change legal/privacy/terms/imprint wording.
routeGroupSummary.desktopBetaPages: Desktop beta mission, dashboard, buddy, settings, points, marketplace, leaderboard, analytics, and challenge routes remain usable, draft, or review_required according to protected-topic metadata; none were advanced to beta_ready.
routeGroupSummary.mobilePwaPages: Mobile/PWA routes remain draft or review_required, with device/privacy/permission/health/camera/AR/AI Buddy/child/reward topics still review-gated and device-test evidence incomplete.
routeGroupSummary.protectedOrReviewRequiredPages: Token/NFT/wallet/payment/trading/payout, rewards/mission authority, PvP/betting/anti-cheat, analytics/privacy/consent, health/child/camera/location/biometric, legal, investor, and public-claim surfaces remain review_required or blocked.

reviewRequiredItems: public page claims and beta/waitlist promises
health or medical-adjacent movement and AI Buddy claims
camera, location, biometric, raw sensor, permission, privacy, and consent claims
reward, mission completion, anti-cheat, PvP/challenge, leaderboard, points, XP, and authority claims
investor, financial-equivalent, roadmap, sponsor, advertising, and partner claims
analytics, tracking, data-use, consent, and profiling claims
blockedItems: No route may be marked conversion_ready, investor_ready, or beta_ready from this audit while protected-topic review evidence is absent.
No runtime website/app/mobile/legal/public-copy/legal-wording/protected-logic changes are authorized by this audit.
No auto-merge, auto-repair, approval, deployment, legal conclusion, public claim approval, token/payment/reward authority activation, or sensitive data-flow expansion is enabled.
trustComplianceWebsiteAudit.runtimeChangeConfirmation: No runtime website, app, mobile, legal, public asset, package, Firebase, GitHub workflow, Functions, Firestore rules, Unity, auto-merge, auto-repair, approval, deployment, or protected product/legal/compliance logic was changed.
